message:
feat(evidence): add Level 2-3, HTML, and Markdown galaxy-brain renderers (bd-qaaxt.5)

Level 2: ASCII histogram for posterior, loss matrix table, feature
importance bars, calibration gauge. Level 3: full JSON dump with
field-by-field diff from previous decision via DiffContext sliding
window. HTML: inline-CSS cards for dashboard embedding with XSS-safe
escaping. Markdown: GFM tables with collapsible posterior details.
33 new tests (44 total in render module), all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
